001package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element;
002
003import java.util.Objects;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.key.Key;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.Nullable;
007
008/**
009 * Represents a circle element.
010 */
011public class Circle extends AbstractElement<Circle> {
012    private Float radius;
013    private Integer resolution;
014    private int innerColor;
015    private int outerColor;
016
017    /**
018     * Create a new circle element.
019     *
020     * @param key Unique identifier
021     */
022    public Circle(@NotNull String key) {
023        this(Key.of(key));
024    }
025
026    /**
027     * Create a new circle element.
028     *
029     * @param key Unique identifier
030     */
031    public Circle(@NotNull Key key) {
032        super(key, Type.CIRCLE);
033    }
034
035    /**
036     * Create a new circle element.
037     *
038     * @param key Unique identifier
039     * @return New circle element
040     */
041    @NotNull
042    public static Circle of(@NotNull String key) {
043        return of(Key.of(key));
044    }
045
046    /**
047     * Create a new circle element.
048     *
049     * @param key Unique identifier
050     * @return New circle element
051     */
052    @NotNull
053    public static Circle of(@NotNull Key key) {
054        return new Circle(key);
055    }
056
057    /**
058     * Get the radius of this circle.
059     * <p>
060     * If null, will default to half screen's width or height, whichever is smaller.
061     *
062     * @return The radius
063     */
064    @Nullable
065    public Float getRadius() {
066        return this.radius;
067    }
068
069    /**
070     * Set the radius of this circle.
071     * <p>
072     * If null, will default to half screen's width or height, whichever is smaller.
073     *
074     * @param radius The radius
075     */
076    public void setRadius(@Nullable Float radius) {
077        this.radius = radius;
078    }
079
080    /**
081     * Get the resolution (number of outer points) for this circle.
082     * <p>
083     * If null, default of <code>{@link #getRadius()}</code> will be used.
084     *
085     * @return Circle resolution
086     */
087    @Nullable
088    public Integer getResolution() {
089        return this.resolution;
090    }
091
092    /**
093     * Set the resolution (number of outer points) for this circle.
094     * <p>
095     * If null, default of <code>{@link #getRadius()}</code> will be used.
096     *
097     * @param resolution Circle resolution
098     */
099    public void setResolution(@Nullable Integer resolution) {
100        this.resolution = resolution;
101    }
102
103    /**
104     * Get the inner color of this circle.
105     *
106     * @return Inner color
107     */
108    public int getInnerColor() {
109        return this.innerColor;
110    }
111
112    /**
113     * Set the inner color of this circle.
114     *
115     * @param color Inner color
116     */
117    public void setInnerColor(int color) {
118        this.innerColor = color;
119    }
120
121    /**
122     * Get the outer color of this circle.
123     *
124     * @return Outer color
125     */
126    public int getOuterColor() {
127        return this.outerColor;
128    }
129
130    /**
131     * Set the outer color of this circle.
132     *
133     * @param color Outer color
134     */
135    public void setOuterColor(int color) {
136        this.outerColor = color;
137    }
138
139    /**
140     * Set the color of this circle.
141     * <p>
142     * Both the inner and outer colors will be set to the specified color.
143     *
144     * @param color Circle color
145     */
146    public void setColor(int color) {
147        setInnerColor(color);
148        setOuterColor(color);
149    }
150
151    @Override
152    public boolean equals(@Nullable Object obj) {
153        if (!super.equals(obj)) {
154            return false;
155        }
156        Circle other = (Circle) obj;
157        return Objects.equals(getRadius(), other.getRadius())
158                && Objects.equals(getResolution(), other.getResolution())
159                && Objects.equals(getInnerColor(), other.getInnerColor())
160                && Objects.equals(getOuterColor(), other.getOuterColor());
161    }
162
163    @Override
164    public int hashCode() {
165        // pacifies codefactor.io
166        return super.hashCode();
167    }
168}
